'''dasaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wurzel|wurzel]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wurzel|wurzel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dasaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæsæzæth|dæsæzæth]] || [[word:dæsæzæj|dæsæzæj]] || [[word:dæsæzæsh|dæsæzæsh]] || [[word:dæsæzæ|dæsæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dasasazath|dasasazath]] || [[word:dasasazaj|dasasazaj]] || [[word:dasasazash|dasasazash]] || [[word:dasasaza|dasasaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dasazath|dasazath]] || [[word:dasazaj|dasazaj]] || [[word:dasazash|dasazash]] || [[word:dasaza|dasaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dasafzath|dasafzath]] || [[word:dasafzaj|dasafzaj]] || [[word:dasafzash|dasafzash]] || [[word:dasafzaf|dasafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dasazatha|dasazatha]] || [[word:dasazaja|dasazaja]] || [[word:dasazasha|dasazasha]] || [[word:dasazaka|dasazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dasazath|dasazath]] || [[word:dasazaj|dasazaj]] || [[word:dasazash|dasazash]] || [[word:dasaza|dasaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dasazathal|dasazathal]] || [[word:dasazajal|dasazajal]] || [[word:dasazashal|dasazashal]] || [[word:dasazakal|dasazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dasazathatha|dasazathatha]] || [[word:dasazajaja|dasazajaja]] || [[word:dasazashasha|dasazashasha]] || [[word:dasazaka|dasazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dasazathan|dasazathan]] || [[word:dasazajan|dasazajan]] || [[word:dasazashan|dasazashan]] || [[word:dasazakan|dasazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dasazathaoro|dasazathaoro]] || [[word:dasazajaoro|dasazajaoro]] || [[word:dasazashaoro|dasazashaoro]] || [[word:dasazakaoro|dasazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
